text: LeCoulte Automail is an automail shop located near Rush Valley. Being ran by Ridel and Dominic LeCoulte, the shop is located in the mountain range between Rush Valley and the town of South Hood, both for the abundance of materials and Dominic's refusal to live in town. Despite it being quite out of the way, LeCoulte Automail seems to have regular customers such as Paninya, and presumably many others from the amount of work that goes on. The shop also appears quite well known in town, having ties to shops such as Atelier Garfiel.
